test_name: RIS HR System - Phase 1 Features (Core Employee Functions)

features: Leave request form with type dropdown

steps_planned.name: Test Leave Request Module
verify: Page title contains 'ลา' (Leave) or 'Leave Request'
Leave balance section displays leave types (Annual, Sick, Personal)
Tab navigation exists (New Request, My Requests, Calendar)
Leave request form is visible with leave type dropdown
steps_planned.code_status: ✓ LeaveRequestPage module implemented with all required features
steps_planned.note: Route is /#/leave (not /#/leave-request as per test spec)

steps_planned.name: Test Leave Calendar
steps_planned.action: Click on 'Calendar' or 'ปฏิทิน' tab
verify: Calendar component renders with month navigation
Thai Buddhist Era year is displayed (e.g., 2569)

steps_planned.name: Test Payslip Module
verify: Page title contains 'สลิปเงินเดือน' or 'Payslip'
Payslip list or recent payslips section is visible
Data masking is applied (amounts show *** or partial numbers)
steps_planned.code_status: ✓ PayslipPage module implemented with data masking toggle

steps_planned.name: Test Tax Documents Section
steps_planned.action: Look for 'Tax Documents' or 'เอกสารภาษี' section/tab
verify: Tax document types are listed (50 ทวิ, ภ.ง.ด.91)
steps_planned.code_status: ✓ Tax documents tab implemented in PayslipPage

steps_planned.name: Test Performance Management Module
verify: Page title contains 'ผลงาน' or 'Performance'
Tab navigation exists (Goals, Progress, Evaluation, History)
steps_planned.code_status: ✓ PerformancePage module implemented with tab navigation

steps_planned.name: Test Goals/KPI Tab
steps_planned.action: Click on 'Goals' or 'เป้าหมาย' tab
verify: Goals list displays with goal names and progress
Each goal shows weight percentage and status indicator
steps_planned.code_status: ✓ Goals tab with weight summary implemented

steps_planned.name: Test Performance Evaluation Tab
steps_planned.action: Click on 'Evaluation' or 'ประเมิน' tab
verify: Evaluation form displays with sections: KPI Results (50%), G-BEST Competency (30%), Attendance (10%)
G-BEST competencies are listed (Guest Focus, Business Acumen, etc.)
steps_planned.code_status: ✓ Evaluation tab with G-BEST competencies and weights implemented

steps_planned.name: Test Language Toggle on Phase 1 Pages
steps_planned.action: Click language toggle to switch language
verify: Labels change to the selected language (Thai/English)
steps_planned.code_status: ✓ i18n support verified in en.json and th.json

steps_planned.name: Check for Console Errors
verify: No critical errors (ignore favicon 404, warnings are OK)

success_criteria.criterion: Leave Request page loads with balance display and form
Leave Calendar renders with Thai Buddhist Era dates
Payslip page displays with data masking
Performance page loads with Goals and Evaluation tabs
G-BEST competency ratings are visible in evaluation

leave_request.recommendation: Update test to use /#/leave or update router to accept /#/leave-request

next_steps: Install and configure Playwright MCP server
Execute browser automation tests with Playwright
Capture screenshots for each test step
Verify runtime behavior matches code implementation
Check for console errors during page navigation
Validate Thai Buddhist Era year display in calendar
Verify data masking in payslip amounts
error: Playwright MCP tools are required to execute browser automation tests. Code review indicates all Phase 1 modules are implemented and ready for testing.
